SQLLite.SQL: DELETE FROM report_map rm WHERE rm.report_queue_id IN ( SELECT rq.id FROM report_queue rq, wp_output wo WHERE wo.warrant_returns_id IS NOT NULL AND wo.warrant_returns_id = ${param.returnId} AND wo.final_ind = 'Y' AND rq.document_id = wo.xmlsource ) AND (rm.legacy_path LIKE '%input' OR rm.legacy_path like '%process')

Security.roles: medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
